Name: Douglas Englebart
Details: Douglas Engelbart (1925–2013) was an American engineer and computer science pioneer who fundamentally transformed how humans interact with computers. He is globally celebrated for inventing the computer mouse, but his visionary concepts laid the structural groundwork for the entire modern digital age

Name: Founders' Day
Details: Kwame Nkrumah Memorial Day / Founders' Day, celebrated on Monday, September 21, 2026 (formerly known simply as Founders' Day). Ghana also recognizes an alternative Founders' Day on August 4 to honor the 'Big Six' and all patriots who sacrificed for the country's freedom
